name: Room Cleaning
description: Request housekeeping to clean the patient room.
example_utterances: can someone come and clean my floor
the bathroom is dirty, please send housekeeping

name: Linen / Bedsheet Change
description: Request fresh bedsheets, pillowcases, or towels.
example_utterances: the sheets are dirty please replace them

name: Meal Request
description: Request meal delivery or dietary preferences.
example_utterances: I would like to order lunch
I am hungry, I need food
please send my meal to room 210

name: Drinking Water
description: Request drinking water or a beverage refill.
example_utterances: can I get a glass of water

name: Nurse Assistance
description: Call a nurse for non-emergency assistance.
example_utterances: please send a nurse to my room
can the nurse come and check on me
I need help from a nurse

name: Medication Reminder
description: Request scheduled or as-needed medication delivery.
example_utterances: I forgot to take my pills

name: Doctor Visit
description: Request the attending doctor to visit.
example_utterances: I want to see the doctor

name: Medical Emergency
description: Signal a medical emergency requiring immediate attention.
example_utterances: help me it is an emergency
I feel like I'm going to faint

name: Room Temperature Adjustment
description: Adjust air conditioning or heating in the room.
example_utterances: can you lower the AC temperature
it is too hot in here

name: Discharge Enquiry
description: Enquire about discharge process, timing, or paperwork.
example_utterances: I want to check out of the hospital

name: Billing Enquiry
description: Question about bills, invoices, or payment.
example_utterances: I have a question about my bill
I need to make a payment
